scenarios_tested.name: LLM quota failure
scenarios_tested.details: GeminiRequestError caught, node marked FAILED, error logged with node_id, pipeline continues

scenarios_tested.name: Network timeout
scenarios_tested.details: All exceptions caught and wrapped in GeminiRequestError, logged with stage_name and error details

scenarios_tested.name: Model not found
scenarios_tested.details: Generic exception handler catches all API errors, converts to GeminiRequestError

scenarios_tested.name: Invalid JSON response - missing braces
scenarios_tested.details: parse_llm_json() raises StructuredLLMError with 'Unmatched braces' message

scenarios_tested.name: Invalid JSON response - markdown wrapped
scenarios_tested.details: Markdown fences stripped correctly, JSON extracted and parsed

scenarios_tested.name: Invalid JSON response - multiple objects
scenarios_tested.details: Only first {...} block extracted, deterministic behavior

scenarios_tested.name: Invalid JSON response - non-JSON text
scenarios_tested.details: Raises StructuredLLMError('No JSON object found in response')

scenarios_tested.name: Schema violation - missing fields
scenarios_tested.details: ValueError raised with 'Missing required keys' message

scenarios_tested.name: Schema violation - wrong types
scenarios_tested.details: Type validation for translated_code, dependencies, notes with specific error messages

scenarios_tested.name: AST node ID corruption
scenarios_tested.details: Node ID checked against ast_index, returns FAILED status with error message containing node_id

scenarios_tested.name: Partial translation detection
scenarios_tested.details: Validation flags incomplete implementations (pass-only, empty functions)

scenarios_tested.name: Dependency cycle injection
scenarios_tested.details: nx.is_directed_acyclic_graph() check, raises ValueError with cycle count and sample cycles

scenarios_tested.name: Hidden LLM call detection
scenarios_tested.evidence: grep search results - no LLM calls in validation/evaluation/documentation
scenarios_tested.details: LLM usage confined to translation module only (app/translation/orchestrator.py)

scenarios_tested.name: File system failure - missing files
scenarios_tested.details: IOError/OSError caught, logged as warnings, returns None, pipeline continues

scenarios_tested.name: File system failure - permission denied
scenarios_tested.details: Exception caught, logged with file_path and error, returns None gracefully

scenarios_tested.name: Pipeline continues after node failure
scenarios_tested.details: try-except around _translate_node(), creates FAILED result, continues loop

scenarios_tested.name: Evaluation report produced on failure
scenarios_tested.details: Evaluation runs regardless of translation failures, uses actual results

scenarios_tested.name: Documentation generated on failure
scenarios_tested.details: Documentation phase runs even with failed translations, handles empty results

guarantees_verified: Deterministic failure - same input produces same error
No crashes - all exceptions caught and logged
Full traceability - node_id, model_name, prompt_version logged
Pipeline continuation - remaining nodes processed after failure
No silent exception swallowing - grep found zero 'except: pass' patterns
LLM isolation - no LLM calls outside translation module
Cycle detection - ValueError raised with cycle details
No infinite recursion - topological sort fails fast on cycles
Evaluation always produced - even with 0 successful translations
Documentation always produced - handles failed nodes gracefully

no_silent_exception_swallowing.evidence: grep search for 'except.*:\s*pass' returned zero matches

all_errors_logged_with_context.evidence: All error handlers include node_id, model_name, prompt_version in extra dict

structured_json_reports_on_failure.evidence: TranslationResult, ValidationReport, EvaluationReport all have to_dict() methods

orchestrator_translate_node.propagation: Returns FAILED result, does not raise

orchestrator_translate_repository.pattern: try-except around each node, creates FAILED result, continues loop
orchestrator_translate_repository.propagation: Appends FAILED result to list, continues processing

response_parser.pattern: Multiple validation steps, each raises StructuredLLMError
response_parser.logging: logger.error() with node_id, model_name, prompt_version, raw_response[:500]

pipeline_service.pattern: try-except around entire pipeline, sets result.success=False
pipeline_service.propagation: Returns PipelineResult with errors list, does not crash

cycle_detection.action_on_detection: raise ValueError with cycle count and samples

llm_usage_isolation.verification: grep search confirmed no LLM calls outside translation

logging_completeness.node_id_logged: All error handlers in orchestrator include node_id
logging_completeness.model_name_logged: response_parser logs model_name on all failures
logging_completeness.prompt_version_logged: response_parser logs prompt_version on all failures
logging_completeness.raw_response_logged: response_parser logs first 500 chars of raw_response on failure
logging_completeness.error_details_logged: All exception handlers log str(e) in extra dict

llm_provider_failures.reason: ASTNode signature mismatch in test fixtures (missing return_type, imports)
llm_provider_failures.note: Logic verified through code inspection, tests need fixture updates

dependency_cycles.reason: ASTNode signature mismatch in test fixtures
dependency_cycles.note: Cycle detection verified in code, nx.is_directed_acyclic_graph() is standard

ast_node_corruption.reason: ASTNode signature mismatch in test fixtures
